title: Plenty Unlimited - Why This Startup Failed
summary: Plenty Unlimited failed due to unsustainable unit economics and building capital-intensive facilities without proving profitability at small scale. The company's vertical farming model faced physics and economics limits; massive capital expenditure didn't translate to profitable unit economics.
rebuild_strategy_brief: Pivot from operating capital-intensive farms to an AI-powered R&D and SaaS platform (Photon Labs) offering modular grow units and AI optimization for high-value crops; revenue via hardware sales, SaaS, and data licensing.
